x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: The customer portal is the primary channel for Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA. Without it Now Assist cannot reach customers.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure and activate a Customer Service Portal via sp_portal_list.do. Enable AI Search and VA on the portal. Test customer-facing Now Assist AI features end-to-end.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[The customer portal is the primary channel for Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA. Without it Now Assist cannot reach customers.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CSM Customer Portal Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check for any active Service Portal — CSM portal naming varies by org
    // Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA require an active portal to reach customers
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sp_portal');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Service Portal(s) configured';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active portal(s) configured. Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA can be delivered to customers via the portal.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active customer portals configured. Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA cannot reach customers without an active Service Portal.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CSM</module><number>CHK0000420</number><order>80</order><remediation_guidance>Configure and activate a Customer Service Portal via sp_portal_list.do. Enable AI Search and VA on the portal. Test customer-facing Now Assist AI features end-to-end.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CSM Customer Portal Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
